MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
RIck Agilberg, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff, Cournale & Co.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, is present appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Cynthia Timmons, is present.
Attorney, Susan Petro, is present representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The Case did not settled, the trial date of October 14, 2008 is confirmed.
